description: One-line description used by Claude to decide when to load this skill. Be specific about trigger conditions.
# Choose ONE of the following invocation controls (delete the others):
user-invocable: false        # Claude auto-loads; hidden from slash menu
disable-model-invocation: true  # Only user can invoke via slash command
# (omit both for skills Claude can auto-load AND user can invoke)

# Optional: pre-approve specific tools when this skill is active
allowed-tools:
  - Read
  - "Bash(gh issue view *)"
